tm1.description: Gabriele coordinates the team, sets goals, and ensures we meet our deadlines.

tm2.description: Arturo is the Head of the Engineering department, he oversees all engineering activities and runs the vast majority of aerodynamic simulations.

tm3.name: Edoardo Bona
tm3.description: Edoardo creates all the graphics for our team, from the race portfolios to the social media posts.

tm4.description: Federico models the various components of the car multiple times to find the best design possible.

tm7.description: Damiano is our Web Developer, he maintains and updates our website.

tm8.description: Edoardo Researches and implements sustainability practices in the workflow of the team, he is the one responsible for the sustainability part of the portfolio.

tm6.description: Pietro models the various components of the car multiple times to find the best design possible.

tm9.name: Jacopo Belmondo
tm9.description: Jacopo builds the test track to run real life tests on the car and collect data on forces and speed in the race.

tm10.name: Leonardo Zucchini
tm10.description: Leonardo is in charge of the car assembly, painting and the material management choices.

tm5.name: Sherine Cirigliano
tm5.description: Sherine models the various components of the car multiple times to find the best design possible.

tm11.name: Matteo Sivera
tm11.description: Matteo is responsible for the marketing presence of the team, he manages our social media accounts and creates content to share on them.

tm12.name: Mattia Petiti
